item.title: It’s Sunday and we’re back for the final day of the cat show in Henderson! If you’re in the Las Vegas area, come on by - it’s at the Whitney Ranch Recreation Center, 1575 W. Galleria Dr. I’m not sure how late the show will be going, but we’ll be here unti
